§6Juices§f

§aExtract fresh fruit juices using the Juicer.§f

All juices require §e2× fruit§f in the §bJuicer§f. Each restores §e2 hunger, 1.2§f saturation and grants a brief §eSpeed§f boost.

§6Juices§f: Apple, Apricot, Blackberry, Blueberry, Cactus Fruit, Carrot, Cherry, Cranberry, Fig, Grape, Grapefruit, Kiwi, Lemon, Lime, Mango, Melon, Orange, Papaya, Peach, Pear, Persimmon, Plum, Pomegranate, Raspberry, Starfruit, Strawberry.

§6Juice Recipes§f:
§b• 2× Fruit§f → §e1× Juice§f (in Juicer)
§b• Each juice restores§f: §e2 hunger, 1.2§f saturation + §eSpeed§f boost
§b• Bait Byproduct§f: Many juice recipes also produce §bFruit Bait§f (for Ground Traps)

§eTip:§f Juices are a great early-game food source once you have fruit trees established. Collect all §e26+ juice types§f for maximum variety.
